49.reason: [This loop only merges adjacent duplicate exponents once, but after setting ans[i+1] to zero, it may still leave non-adjacent duplicates or fail to fully combine all like terms. Also, accessing ans[i+1] when i == num-1 leads to out-of-bounds read.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.5 , reason:  [This loop only merges adjacent duplicate exponents once, but after setting ans[i+1] to zero, it may still leave non-adjacent duplicates or fail to fully combine all like terms. Also, accessing ans[i+1] when i == num-1 leads to out-of-bounds read.]

55.reason: [This output logic incorrectly skips only terms where both coefficient and exponent are zero. However, during merging, zero-coefficient terms with non-zero exponents (e.g., from cancellation) are not skipped, leading to incorrect output. Also, the previous merging step is flawed, so zero coefficients may remain unhandled.]
